$comment: University Course Management — educational EntityMap example. Covers departments, teachers, students, courses, lessons, attendance, assignments and grading.

meta.title: University Course Domain Model
meta.author: EntityMap Example
meta.description: A complete academic domain: departments house teachers and courses; students enroll per semester; lessons run in rooms; attendance is tracked per lesson; assignments are submitted and graded; a final course grade is stored per enrollment.

entities.name: LessonType
entities.comment: Academic format of a lesson session.

fields.name: LECTURE
fields.comment: One teacher speaks to the full group. Theory-heavy.

fields.name: SEMINAR
fields.comment: Interactive discussion, student presentations.

fields.name: LAB
fields.comment: Hands-on laboratory or computer practice.

fields.name: PRACTICE
fields.comment: Guided exercise session, smaller group.

fields.name: EXAM
fields.comment: Formal examination session.

fields.name: CONSULT
fields.comment: Optional office-hour style consultation.

entities.name: DayOfWeek
entities.comment: ISO weekday for recurring schedule slots.

entities.name: AttendanceStatus
entities.comment: How a student's presence at a lesson is recorded.

fields.name: PRESENT
fields.comment: Was in the room on time.

fields.name: LATE
fields.comment: Arrived, but after the lesson started.

fields.name: ABSENT
fields.comment: Did not attend. No reason given.

fields.name: EXCUSED
fields.comment: Absent with an accepted medical or admin excuse.

entities.name: GradeLetter
entities.comment: Standard letter-grade scale used for final course grades.

fields.name: A
fields.comment: Excellent — 90–100 points.

fields.name: B
fields.comment: Good — 75–89 points.

fields.name: C
fields.comment: Satisfactory — 60–74 points.

fields.name: D
fields.comment: Poor — 50–59 points. Conditionally passes.

fields.name: F
fields.comment: Fail — below 50 points. Must retake.

entities.name: SubmissionStatus
entities.comment: Lifecycle state of a student assignment submission.

fields.name: DRAFT
fields.comment: Saved by student but not submitted yet.

fields.name: SUBMITTED
fields.comment: Handed in, awaiting review.

fields.name: GRADED
fields.comment: Teacher has reviewed and scored.

fields.name: RETURNED
fields.comment: Sent back for revision.

fields.name: LATE
fields.comment: Submitted after the deadline.

entities.name: Department
entities.comment: Academic department (кафедра). Groups related courses and teachers under one organizational unit.

fields.name: id
fields.comment: Surrogate primary key.

fields.name: code
fields.comment: Short department code, e.g. 'CS', 'MATH', 'PHYS'.

fields.name: name
fields.comment: Full official name of the department.

fields.name: building
fields.comment: Main building where the department is located.

fields.name: email
fields.comment: Contact email address for the department office.

fields.name: head_teacher_id
fields.comment: FK → Teacher.id. Head / chair of the department. Nullable: set after teachers exist.

entities.name: Semester
entities.comment: An academic term. Enrollments, lessons, and grades belong to a specific semester.

fields.name: label
fields.comment: Human label, e.g. 'Fall 2025', 'Spring 2026'.

fields.name: start_date
fields.comment: First day of the semester (classes start).

fields.name: end_date
fields.comment: Last day of the semester (including exam week).

fields.name: is_active
fields.comment: True for the currently running semester. At most one should be true at a time.
fields.$comment: Enforce single-active constraint at application level or via DB trigger.

entities.name: Room
entities.comment: Physical classroom or lecture hall where lessons take place.

fields.name: number
fields.comment: Room identifier, e.g. '101', 'A-204', 'Online'.

fields.name: building
fields.comment: Building name or abbreviation.

fields.name: capacity
fields.comment: Max number of students the room can hold.

fields.name: has_projector
fields.comment: Whether the room has a projector / display.

fields.name: has_computers
fields.comment: Whether the room has workstation computers (lab room).

entities.name: Teacher
entities.comment: University instructor. Belongs to one department, can teach multiple courses.

fields.name: id
fields.comment: UUID primary key.

fields.name: department_id
fields.comment: FK → Department.id. Primary department affiliation.

fields.name: last_name
fields.comment: Indexed for name-based search.

fields.name: academic_title
fields.comment: e.g. 'Prof.', 'Dr.', 'Assoc. Prof.'

fields.name: bio
fields.comment: Short teacher biography for student-facing profile.

fields.name: is_active
fields.comment: False = on leave or no longer employed.

methods.name: fullName
methods.comment: Returns 'Dr. John Smith' format with title prefix.

entities.name: Student
entities.comment: Person enrolled at the university. Can enroll in multiple courses per semester.

fields.name: student_number
fields.comment: Official university student ID number.

fields.name: email
fields.comment: University-issued student email.

fields.name: year_of_study
fields.comment: Academic year level: 1 = freshman … 4 = senior (or 5/6 for longer programs).

fields.name: gpa
fields.comment: Cumulative GPA, recalculated after each semester. NULL = no grades yet.
fields.$comment: Consider computing this as a DB view rather than storing it.

fields.name: enrolled_at
fields.comment: Date the student was first admitted to the university.

fields.name: is_active
fields.comment: False = graduated, suspended, or withdrawn.

methods.name: activeEnrollments
methods.comment: Returns enrollments in the currently active semester.

entities.name: Course
entities.comment: An academic discipline / subject offered by a department. One course can run multiple semesters.

fields.name: department_id
fields.comment: FK → Department.id. Owning department.

fields.name: code
fields.comment: Course code, e.g. 'CS301', 'MATH201'.

fields.name: title
fields.comment: Full course title, e.g. 'Introduction to Algorithms'.

fields.name: description
fields.comment: Syllabus summary shown to students before enrolling.

fields.name: credits
fields.comment: Number of ECTS or credit-hours. Typically 3–6.

fields.name: max_students
fields.comment: Maximum enrollment capacity per semester offering.

fields.name: is_elective
fields.comment: True = optional elective. False = mandatory core curriculum.

entities.name: CourseTeacher
entities.comment: Junction: which teacher(s) teach which course in a given semester. Resolves the many-to-many between Course and Teacher.
entities.$comment: A single course can have a lecturer + a lab instructor in the same semester.

fields.name: role
fields.comment: Optional role label, e.g. 'Lecturer', 'Lab Instructor', 'Teaching Assistant'.

entities.name: Lesson
entities.comment: A single scheduled class session — one occurrence of a course on a specific date and time. Attendance is tracked per lesson.

fields.name: course_id
fields.comment: FK → Course.id. Which course this lesson belongs to.

fields.name: semester_id
fields.comment: FK → Semester.id. Redundant but useful for quick querying.

fields.name: teacher_id
fields.comment: FK → Teacher.id. Who conducted this specific lesson.

fields.name: room_id
fields.comment: FK → Room.id. Nullable for fully online lessons.

fields.name: lesson_type
fields.comment: Format of this session.

fields.name: title
fields.comment: Optional topic title, e.g. 'Binary Trees — Part 2'.

fields.name: scheduled_date
fields.comment: Calendar date of the lesson.

fields.name: start_time
fields.comment: Lesson start time (local university timezone).

fields.name: end_time
fields.comment: Lesson end time.

fields.name: notes
fields.comment: Teacher's notes or materials link for this lesson.

fields.name: is_cancelled
fields.comment: True if the lesson was cancelled (e.g. sick day). Attendance rows still exist but are marked EXCUSED.

entities.name: Enrollment
entities.comment: Records that a specific student is registered for a specific course in a specific semester. The main junction between Student and Course.

fields.name: student_id
fields.comment: FK → Student.id.

fields.name: course_id
fields.comment: FK → Course.id.

fields.name: semester_id
fields.comment: FK → Semester.id.

fields.name: enrolled_at
fields.comment: Timestamp when the student clicked 'Enroll'.

fields.name: dropped_at
fields.comment: If non-null, the student dropped the course on this date.

fields.name: is_active
fields.comment: False = dropped or administratively removed.

entities.name: Attendance
entities.comment: One row per (Student × Lesson). Records whether a student was present at a particular lesson.

fields.name: student_id
fields.comment: FK → Student.id.

fields.name: lesson_id
fields.comment: FK → Lesson.id.

fields.name: status
fields.comment: Presence status recorded by the teacher.

fields.name: recorded_at
fields.comment: When the attendance was entered into the system.

fields.name: note
fields.comment: Optional teacher note, e.g. 'Left 20 min early.' or 'Medical certificate attached.'

entities.name: Assignment
entities.comment: A task, homework or exam that belongs to a course. Students submit responses that get graded.

fields.name: course_id
fields.comment: FK → Course.id. Assignments die with their course (composition).

fields.name: title
fields.comment: Assignment title, e.g. 'Homework 3 — Sorting Algorithms'.

fields.name: description
fields.comment: Full task description. May contain Markdown.

fields.name: max_score
fields.comment: Maximum points a student can earn.

fields.name: weight
fields.comment: Weight in final course grade calculation. E.g. 0.30 = 30% of the grade.
fields.$comment: All assignment weights for a course should sum to 1.0.

fields.name: due_date
fields.comment: Submission deadline. Null = no deadline (in-class work).

fields.name: allow_late
fields.comment: Whether late submissions are accepted at all (possibly with penalty).

fields.name: late_penalty_pct
fields.comment: Percentage deducted per day late. 0 = no penalty (or late not allowed).

entities.name: Submission
entities.comment: A student's response to an assignment. One student → one submission per assignment (re-submissions update the same row).

fields.name: assignment_id
fields.comment: FK → Assignment.id.

fields.name: student_id
fields.comment: FK → Student.id.

fields.name: status
fields.comment: Current lifecycle state.

fields.name: content
fields.comment: Text body of the submission (answers, code, essay, etc.).

fields.name: file_url
fields.comment: URL of uploaded file (PDF, ZIP, etc.) in storage.
fields.$comment: Store in object storage (S3 / GCS). Only keep the URL here.

fields.name: submitted_at
fields.comment: Timestamp of final submission. Null = still a draft.

fields.name: score
fields.comment: Points awarded by the teacher. Null = not graded yet.

fields.name: feedback
fields.comment: Teacher's written feedback, returned to the student.

fields.name: graded_at
fields.comment: When the teacher completed grading.

fields.name: graded_by
fields.comment: FK → Teacher.id. Who graded this submission.

entities.name: CourseGrade
entities.comment: Final grade awarded to a student for a course at the end of a semester. One record per enrollment.

fields.name: enrollment_id
fields.comment: FK → Enrollment.id. One final grade per enrollment.

fields.name: numeric_score
fields.comment: Weighted average of all submission scores. Null = not yet calculated.

fields.name: letter_grade
fields.comment: Final letter grade derived from numeric_score.

fields.name: passed
fields.comment: True if the student passes the course (letter_grade ≠ F).

fields.name: issued_at
fields.comment: When the teacher officially submitted the grade.

fields.name: issued_by
fields.comment: FK → Teacher.id. Teacher who signed off the grade.

fields.name: notes
fields.comment: Administrative notes, e.g. 'Incomplete — medical leave. Extension granted.'

relations.name: Department → Teacher
relations.comment: Many teachers belong to one department. Teachers can exist without a department (visiting staff), but a department cannot be deleted while teachers reference it.

relations.name: Department → Course
relations.comment: Many courses belong to one department.

relations.name: Department.head_teacher_id → Teacher
relations.comment: A department may have one head teacher. If teacher is deleted, head becomes null.

relations.name: CourseTeacher → Course
relations.comment: CourseTeacher rows die when their course is deleted.

relations.name: CourseTeacher → Teacher
relations.comment: Cannot remove a teacher who is assigned to courses.

relations.name: Lesson → Course
relations.comment: A lesson cannot exist without its course. Deleting a course cascades to all its lessons.

relations.name: Lesson → Teacher
relations.comment: Each lesson is conducted by one teacher.

relations.name: Lesson → Room
relations.comment: Lessons are held in a room (aggregation: room exists independently). Nullable for online-only lessons.

relations.name: Enrollment → Student
relations.comment: Many enrollments per student (one per course per semester).

relations.name: Attendance → Lesson
relations.comment: Attendance rows die with their lesson (composition).

relations.name: Assignment → Course
relations.comment: Assignments are parts of a course. They cannot exist independently.

relations.name: Submission → Assignment
relations.comment: Submissions die when the assignment is deleted.

relations.name: Submission.graded_by → Teacher
relations.comment: Tracks who graded a submission. Optional: some submissions may be auto-graded.

relations.name: CourseGrade → Enrollment
relations.comment: One final grade per enrollment. Grade cannot exist without an enrollment.

relations.name: CourseGrade.issued_by → Teacher
relations.comment: The teacher who officially signed off the final grade.
